title: Install the Delegation Contract: routing-and-contracts section + per-skill delegate/decide lines (D2/D3)
action: Per D2/D3 (CONTEXT.md) and the 'Delegation Contract' section of plan.md (the content spec — follow it, do not redesign). In routing-and-contracts.md: REPLACE the advisor-mode section (lines 172-186, heading '### Advisor mode ...decision 0013') with a '### Delegation contract (fan-out: decide-altitude vs gather-altitude)' section carrying: the decide-altitude list (gates, Socratic questions, mode gate, findings synthesis, accept/reject, state writes, human conversation stay on the session model), the D2 rubric (delegate a mechanical step down-tier when it needs reading >3 files OR digest-only content; orchestrator override both ways, spirit of decision 0016), the D3 lane rule (applies every lane/phase; tiny/small '0 subagents' means zero CEREMONY subagents — reviewers/checkers/panels; I/O workers exempt; a 1-file tiny fix never crosses the rubric), the digest contract (paths read, facts with file:line anchors, verbatim quotes only where asked; the orchestrator never re-reads what a digest answers), and transport (anchored [bee-tier] marker or model param per 0023, model name in the description, background where supported per 0017, P22 dispatch log is the audit; I/O workers do NOT register via bee_state worker add). In each of the 11 SKILL.md files listed (10 phase skills + bee-hive), REPLACE the existing 'ad-hoc dispatches default to the generation slot' sentence (exploring:23, planning:45, scribing:20, grooming:70, xia:30) or ADD one line (hive, validating, swarming, reviewing, compounding, briefing) that names that skill's gather-altitude steps and points to the contract: use the plan.md per-skill table verbatim for which steps and tiers. Keep each line to 1-2 sentences — pointer to the contract, not a restated essay (lean harness). In bee-hive SKILL.md amend BOTH '0 subagents' occurrences in the Lanes table (the tiny row ~line 109 AND the small row ~line 110) to read '0 ceremony subagents (I/O-offload workers exempt — Delegation contract)'. In bee-swarming SKILL.md line 55 reword the rescue ladder rung 2 exactly per plan.md (top rung hands the blocker back to the orchestrator with evidence; advisor sentence deleted) and delete the 'or a called-only advisor (rescue ladder)' clause at swarming-reference.md:50. Remove every remaining 'advisor mode'/'decision 0013' reliance in these files (the word 'advisory' as an adjective for hook events is NOT advisor mode — leave it).

truths: routing-and-contracts.md has exactly one Delegation contract section and zero advisor-mode sections
all 10 phase skills + hive carry a one-line delegation pointer naming their own gather-altitude steps
tiny/small lane wording says ceremony subagents, exempting I/O workers (D3), without weakening lane scaling v2's reviewer/checker limits
rescue ladder no longer references advisor mode; ceiling rung = hand back to orchestrator
key_links: decisions 0016, 0017, 0021, 0023, d02a6bc6 (lane scaling v2 — amended not repealed)
prohibitions: no new hook, no threshold enforcement machinery (D2 prose-ruled)
do not touch lib/*.mjs, tests, README, docs/ outside the two reference files listed
do not remove the review-slot (0021) or cell-tier (0016) wording from validating/reviewing/swarming

verify: grep -q 'Delegation contract' skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md && ! grep -qi 'advisor mode' skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md && for f in hive exploring planning validating swarming reviewing scribing compounding grooming briefing xia; do grep -qil 'delegat' skills/bee-$f/SKILL.md || { echo missing:$f; exit 1; }; done && ! grep -qi 'called-only advisor' skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md

trace.outcome: Replaced the advisor-mode section in routing-and-contracts.md with the Delegation contract (decide-altitude list, D2 rubric, D3 lane rule, digest contract, transport); added a one-line delegation pointer to all 11 SKILL.md files (hive + 10 phase skills) naming each skill's gather-altitude steps and tier per plan.md's table; amended both bee-hive lane-table '0 subagents' cells to '0 ceremony subagents (I/O-offload workers exempt)'; reworded the swarming rescue-ladder rung 2 and deleted the 'called-only advisor' clause in swarming-reference.md.
